panels.title: SCD-41 CO2
panels.description: Bands (common indoor air quality guidance): <800ppm Good, 800-1200 Moderate, 1200-2000 Poor, >2000 Very Poor (stuffiness/drowsiness).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "aqm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "co2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "aqm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "scd4x_temperature")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "aqm")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "air_quality")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "scd4x_humidity")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
